# resend Provider

The Resend provider manages resources for the [Resend](https://resend.com) email API, including domains, API keys, and webhooks.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Resend API key. Can also be set via `RESEND_API_KEY` environment variable.
